nodes.name: Google Contacts
nodes.notes: Fetch contacts with names, birthdays, emails, phone numbers, and biographies. Biography can hold a Telegram chat ID if you choose that workaround.

nodes.name: If WhatsApp
nodes.notes: Routes only contacts with a normalized phone number that fits WhatsApp validation.

nodes.name: WhatsApp Skipped
nodes.notes: Sets a readable status when a WhatsApp-safe phone number is not available.

nodes.name: If Telegram
nodes.notes: Routes only contacts with a numeric Telegram chat ID.

nodes.name: Telegram Skipped
nodes.notes: Sets a readable status when Telegram delivery is not possible.

assignments.name: telegramStatus
assignments.value: Skipped - no valid Telegram chat ID

parameters.content:
## Input stage
- **Schedule Trigger** runs daily at 8 AM.
- **Google Contacts** fetches birthdays, names, emails, phone numbers, and biographies.
- Biography can be used as a temporary place to store a Telegram chat ID.

## Validation stage
**Normalize + Validate** cleans names, extracts birthday month/day, validates email, normalizes phone numbers for WhatsApp, and checks whether Telegram has a numeric chat ID. Only contacts with birthdays today continue.

## AI stage
**AI Birthday Message** should return JSON with `subject`, `emailMessage`, and `shortMessage`. **Prepare Messages** adds safe fallback copy if the model returns incomplete data.

## Email branch
Send through Gmail only when `hasEmail = true`. Sent and skipped states are both written back so the final summary stays readable.

## WhatsApp branch
Send through WhatsApp Business Cloud only when the phone number passes validation. Replace `YOUR_WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID` and attach WhatsApp credentials before activation.

## Telegram branch
Telegram delivery needs a real numeric `chatId` already known to your bot. If you only have a username or phone number, this branch is not reliable enough for production.

## Final reporting
The merge nodes recombine all channel branches. **Build Summary** formats one Slack message per birthday contact, and **Slack Final Notification** posts the final operational result.

# Birthday reminders
Runs every morning, pulls Google Contacts, filters contacts whose birthday is today, generates a personalized message, sends it through available channels, and posts a final Slack summary.

## Approval checklist
- Add Slack channel ID.
- Add WhatsApp phone number ID.
- Confirm OpenAI credentials and prompt output.
- Confirm Google Contacts exposes `biographies` if you use it for Telegram IDs.
- Test each branch manually before enabling the schedule.

nodes.name: Normalize + Validate1
nodes.notes: Normalizes contact data, validates channel readiness, and keeps only contacts whose birthday matches today.

nodes.name: AI Birthday Message1
nodes.notes: Generates one reusable birthday message object for email and chat channels.

nodes.name: Prepare Messages1
nodes.notes: Applies fallback message values if the AI response is empty or incomplete.

nodes.name: If Email1
nodes.notes: Routes only contacts with a validated email address to Gmail.

nodes.name: Gmail1
nodes.notes: Sends the personalized birthday email only when email validation passed.

nodes.name: Email Skipped1
nodes.notes: Sets a readable status when email is unavailable or invalid.

nodes.name: Email Sent1
nodes.notes: Marks the email delivery path as sent for the final summary.

nodes.name: WhatsApp1
nodes.notes: Sends a short birthday message through WhatsApp Business Cloud. Replace the phoneNumberId and attach valid credentials.

nodes.name: WhatsApp Sent1
nodes.notes: Marks the WhatsApp delivery path as sent for the final summary.

nodes.name: Telegram1
nodes.notes: Sends a Telegram birthday message. This will fail without a valid bot-accessible chat ID.

nodes.name: Telegram Sent1
nodes.notes: Marks the Telegram delivery path as sent for the final summary.

nodes.name: Merge Email1
nodes.notes: Merges the sent and skipped email branches back into one item stream.

nodes.name: Merge WhatsApp1
nodes.notes: Combines the email result with the WhatsApp sent or skipped branch.

nodes.name: Merge Telegram1
nodes.notes: Combines prior channel results with the Telegram sent or skipped branch.

nodes.name: Build Summary1
nodes.notes: Builds the final Slack-friendly summary showing sent or skipped status per channel.

nodes.name: Slack Final Notification1
nodes.notes: Posts the final ops summary to Slack after all channel branches finish.
